items.title: BLINK DB — High-Performance In-Memory Key-Value Store
items.problem: Existing in-memory stores hide their cost behind abstraction layers. I wanted to know how close a single-threaded epoll loop in C++ could get to Redis-class throughput from scratch.
items.outcome: 58K SET ops/sec and 47K GET ops/sec on a single thread, sustaining 10,000+ concurrent client connections via epoll-based I/O multiplexing. Custom eviction and persistence to control memory under sustained load.

items.title: Equitable Graph Coloring for Structured Graph Classes
items.problem: Equitable coloring — partitioning vertices into color classes of nearly equal size — is NP-hard in general. The question is which structured graph families admit polynomial-time algorithms with tight chromatic bounds.
items.outcome: M.Tech thesis: polynomial-time algorithms for circular-arc graphs, block graphs, and bipartite outerplanar graphs. Formal proofs deriving tight chromatic-number bounds with applications to scheduling and load balancing.

items.title: Air Quality Monitoring — Real-Time Data Platform
items.problem: Public AQI data is fragmented across endpoints and rarely shown as a live, multi-pollutant view that updates without forcing a page reload.
items.outcome: Real-time AQI dashboard integrating the WAQI API across PM2.5, PM10, and other pollutants. Containerized end-to-end with Docker for consistent deploys. React frontend with API-polling for live refresh.

items.title: BlockCart — Decentralised E-Commerce on Ethereum
items.problem: Centralised marketplaces require trust in the operator for listing integrity, payment settlement, and ownership transfer.
items.outcome: Solidity contracts covering the full product lifecycle — listing, purchase, ownership transfer — with cryptographic guarantees. Deployed and validated on Ethereum testnet with simulated multi-user flows.

items.title: Face Super-Resolution using DCGAN + SRGAN
items.problem: Surveillance and identity verification systems break on occluded or low-resolution faces — both inpainting and upscaling must work together to preserve identity.
items.outcome: Two-stage pipeline: DCGAN inpaints occluded regions, SRGAN upscales and sharpens the reconstruction. Deployed as a Flask REST API for real-time inference from web clients.

items.title: Flight Delay Prediction Model
items.problem: Commercial flight delays depend on weather, route, airline, and historical signals — most simple predictors collapse on imbalanced, high-dimensional aviation data.
items.outcome: Engineered features and handled class imbalance across large-scale flight records. Benchmarked multiple classifiers, deployed the best as a Flask web service exposing live delay-probability endpoints.

items.title: Hand Gesture Controlled Robot
items.problem: Replace a handheld controller with continuous, intuitive control of a robotic vehicle using real-time hand orientation.
items.outcome: Wearable glove with accelerometer captures 3D hand tilt; Arduino processes input and drives RF link to the chassis. Validated wirelessly at an effective range of 10 metres.
